Author: Zana Remina
Name: Housing NPC Pose
Description: v0.3.2 stable checkpoint. Lists visible housing NPC/object candidates, blocks known non-humanoid creature NPCs, applies confirmed useful local pose values, saves local pose assignments for matching NPCs in the current area, and optionally auto-applies them after zoning/plugin load. Client-side only: no packets, spawning, movement, hooks, or effects on other clients.
